summary: A Russian "Elka" anti-drone system intercepted a Ukrainian "Darts" fixed-wing drone, triggering its onboard charge. The 412th Nemesis Brigade's "G-Day" operation destroyed over 130 vehicles and dozens of motorcycles near Huliaipole in January-February 2026. A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was likely downed by a 59th Brigade FPV drone on the Pokrovsk front, with additional footage showing a Ka-52 being struck near Nadiivka and its crew eliminated during evacuation. The "Rubikon" Center reported 83 targets neutralized on March 21, 2026, including Ukrainian UAVs and control points. Ukrainian forces sank a Russian boat near Tendrivska Spit using an FPV drone, and the SBU's "Alpha" unit neutralized 1,834 Russian troops in a week. An Iranian-backed militia attacked the US Victory Base in Iraq with a fiber-optic FPV drone. Ukrainian FPV pilots are experimenting with tactics like throwing riders off horses before strikes, and a Russian soldier was filmed charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and losing. Airstrikes targeted Ukrainian drone launch points and air defenses in Krasnoyarskoye, DNR.
